changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.createView: select gt.*, ixf."index" f_index, ixf."name" f_name, ixf."path" f_path, ixf.base_path f_base_path, ixf.full_path f_full_path, ixf."size" f_size, ixf.indexer_id f_indexer_id, ixf.last_modified_date f_last_modified_date, ixf.index_added_date f_index_added_date, ixf.index_update_date f_index_update_date, ixf.indexer_status f_indexer_status, gd.id as gd_id, gd.create_date gd_create_date, gd.precision_in_meter gd_precision_in_meter, gd.track_type gd_track_type, gd.track gd_track from gps_track gt left join gps_track_data gd on gt.id = gd.gps_track_id left join indexed_file ixf on ixf.id = gt.file_id where gd.precision_in_meter = 10
